title: JUMP-2334 Atsushi Ministry of Labor Medium School Periodic Health Examination Result Report Forbidden 4 Hours Teachers Are More Dangerous Than Normal-Looking Teachers! !
overview: In recent years, teachers who have committed obscene acts toward female students have often become a problem in the news, but that is only the story of a teacher who was caught for failing. Under the guise of a diagnosis, there are cunning teachers who repeatedly play tricks on innocent and ignorant adolescent girls. The full picture of many crazy teachers who want to do whatever they want is now becoming clear.
